title: Delete the pi tickflow harness (.pi/) and its operator docs
description:
Context: .pi/extensions/tickflow/ (index.ts ~2,575 LOC + README) is the old Tickflow runner integration for the pi harness. The repo is now orchestrated exclusively from Claude Code (see docs/claude-code-swarm-architecture.md); the human owner has decided to delete the pi harness entirely.

Deliverable: remove the pi harness and its operator-facing docs in one commit.
1. Delete .pi/ entirely.
2. .gitignore: remove the '.tickflow-bin/' line (the only generator of those copies was .pi/extensions/tickflow/index.ts).
3. Docs triage under docs/: DELETE docs that instruct how to run/configure tickflow (e.g. docs/tickflow-config-resume.md and any other operate/configure guides); KEEP historical results/records (docs/tickflow-soak-results.md, docs/tickflow-soak-scenarios.md, docs/dogfood/tickflow-parallel-approvals/* are run records - history stays). Use judgment, report the kept/deleted split.
4. Reference grep before/after: grep -rn 'tickflow|\.pi/' across the repo excluding .git, .tick, internal/tickboard (the UI component named tickflow-dashboard is a DIFFERENT thing - a board view - and is owned by a parallel tick; do not touch internal/tickboard or internal/tick), and excluding kept historical docs. No dangling references to .pi/ or .tickflow-bin in live code/scripts/CI.

Verification: go build ./... green; pnpm-free change (no UI files touched); grep clean as defined above.

Files likely touched: .pi/ (deleted), .gitignore, docs/tickflow-*.md, docs/dogfood/ (kept).
acceptance_criteria: .pi/ deleted; .gitignore tickflow-bin line removed; operator docs deleted with historical records kept and the split reported; go build green; no live references to .pi/ or .tickflow-bin remain
